title: Micro-Retro Feedback Log Entry
description: Post-session feedback capture for human-agent retrospectives

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was captured

session_id.description: Unique identifier linking to the session

alignment.description: How aligned was the agent with user intent (1-5)

rework_needed.description: Amount of rework required after the session

revision_cycles.description: Number of revision cycles during the session

worked_well.description: What worked well during the session

examples.improvement_suggestion: Reference existing files when asking for similar patterns
examples.worked_well: Good at breaking down complex tasks into steps
